{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan army
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Damascan royal army]] is the military force of the [[Kingdom]] of [[Damasca]], characterized by its distinctive red-and-gold uniforms. Unlike many other forces, the army is not commanded by a single [[Overlord]] but serves the kingdom as a whole. In combat, the soldiers are known for maintaining orderly ranks and communicating through shouted orders. Their equipment includes shields and spears, and they have been associated with the use of automatons on the battlefield. The military has a history of engaging in pitched battles, including conflicts with [[Valinhall]] and the [[Dragon Army]]. Recently, the army has been involved in significant preparations for an attack on the city of [[Enosh]], utilizing various weapons arrayed across multiple territories.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan army]] is gathering outside [[Alin]]'s city.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The bulk of the [[Damascan army]] was positioned behind [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan army]] is intended to be kept defensive and unsure.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan army]] is a military group.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has been working with the [[Damascan army]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“I’ve been working with the Damascan army, but…”<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
